name: G-6 source-file validator: --now + --max-age-days warn when fetched_at is older than the freshness window
command:
printf 'source:
  id: test-src
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: https://e.t/d
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z"
  content_hash: "sha256:abc123"
  fetch_frequency: weekly
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: "MIT"
rules: []
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
' > sf.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-source-file.sh" "$PWD/sf.yaml" --now 2026-06-01T00:00:00Z --max-age-days 30 2>err.txt; grep -q 'stale fetched_at' err.txt && echo freshness_warn 1>&2
